div.head:
No. 296.
Mr. Andrews to Mr. Fish.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Stockholm, January 3, 1876. (Received January 25.)

div.p: Sir: I have the honor to report that the number of Swedish emigrants who during the year 1875 shipped from the port of Gothenburg to the United States was 3,978, being 657 more than during the year 1874.
It is estimated that during the year 1875 as many as 2,500 Swedes returned from the United States, through the port of Gothenburg, to their native country.
